preferences.name: includeMsStore
preferences.title: Sources
preferences.label: Include Microsoft Store results
preferences.description: When enabled searches both winget and Microsoft Store, when disabled only winget packages are shown.

commands.name: uninstall
commands.title: Uninstall
commands.description: Browse and uninstall installed WinGet packages
commands.subtitle: WinGet

commands.name: upgrade
commands.title: Upgrade
commands.description: Upgrade WinGet packages with available updates
commands.subtitle: WinGet

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
